message:
Fix test spy restoration leak and unused variable from PR #10317 (#10322)

- Add afterEach(() => vi.restoreAllMocks()) to both describe blocks in
  validate.test.ts that spy on console.warn in beforeEach
- Remove unused destructured 'id' variable in scannableIdsByLevel.test.ts

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
